race.description: Bam Country Boosted Showcase Maiden Plate
race.comment: CLASSIC TOUCH (12) finds an easier contest today despite drawing out. Savaged the line with an eye-catching second over 1300m at Goulburn. At her top for this and will relish the 1400m. Hard to hold out. C'MON WICKSY (2) was never comfortable on the tight turning track from the inside gate with a disappointing eleventh over 1460m at Queanbeyan. Closed late over this course and distance two-back and the blinkers and tongue-tie come off. Improver. DUNNA RUNNA (9) gripped on late with an improved fourth over 1300m at Goulburn. Near his peak and sure to be thereabouts. EXCEED SUCCESS (4) is ready for this trip after failing to stretch out in the heavy (9) going over 1100m at Nowra. Worth thought.
